use_codes.desc: THERAPEUTIC TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER, SYMPTOMATIC BONE METASTASES AND NO KNOWN VISCERAL METASTATIC DISEASE

indications.text:
Xofigo is indicated for the treatment of patients with castration-resistant prostate cancer, symptomatic bone metastases
and no known visceral metastatic disease.
